g.text: Timestamp when alert was last updated
Direct link back to original source
Indicates if event is planned (Transport NSW)
Indicates if alert is classified as major
Indicates if alert impacts transport network
Start time of planned or ongoing event
Raw JSON/XML payload from source for traceability and debugging
Region label provided by source (may differ from internal mapping)
Category name (e.g., Bush Fire, Flood, Traffic)
Source system (e.g., RFS, SES, Transport NSW)
Region name (e.g., Northern Rivers, Sydney Metro)
Standardised status (e.g., Active, Under Control, Ended)
